class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-grnkmacswd4u" data-node="grnkmacswd4u"><h2 class=" vc_custom_heading" style="text-align: center;">What is Elevations RTC: One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers</h2></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-97w1mhsgrkje" data-node="97w1mhsgrkje"><p>Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From <a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/depression-treatment-centers/">depression</a> to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.</p><p>Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.</p><p>All of this takes place in a <strong>medically comprehensive residential treatment centers</strong> environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-heading-text fl-node-hzgyjvkaxq92" data-node="hzgyjvkaxq92"> Are you struggling to find the right help for your teen?</h2><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-m2nk3pi659rl fl-animation fl-fade-in" data-node="m2nk3pi659rl" data-animation-delay="0.0" data-animation-duration="1"><p>The professional clinicians at Elevations residential treatment centers have served as guardians of change for adolescents struggling to find hope and acceptance. Every day, our skilled and passionate professionals encourage students to build upon their strengths and abandon self-defeating behaviors. Because of this, our clinicians are among the most sought out group of professionals in the industry, garnishing referrals from both parents and professionals alike.</p><div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><p><strong>When you send your child to Elevations RTC, one of the leading residential treatment centers,  you can be confident that they will receive the most advanced therapeutic intervention possible.</strong>  The problems they face in today’s world are very complicated and because of this, their struggle to regain a sure foundation requires a well tailored and proven approach.</p></div></div></div> <style>.fl-node-m2nk3pi659rl.fl-animation:not(.fl-animated){opacity:0}</style><div  class="fl-module fl-module-button fl-button-wrap We have teachers who directly teach concepts instead of students having to learn through packets or assignments. Elevations RTC also offers a all gender environment.</p><p>Elevations RTC teaches students practical study skills which will empower them to succeed in education long after leaving this setting. We teach critical thinking, organization, note-taking, setting goals and monitoring progress, recognizing priorities, maximizing use of time, discovering confidence, and envisioning success.</p><p>Our teaching <a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/team/">staff</a> will not only help your child learn, but will provide them with the tools to be successful in high school, college or beyond.</p></div> <style>.fl-node-jikc64bg2ws7.fl-animation:not(.fl-animated){opacity:0}</style><div  class="fl-module fl-module-button fl-button-wrap fl-button-width-auto fl-button-center fl-button-has-icon fl-node-j30om27pdgwi" data-node="j30om27pdgwi"> <a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/academics/"  target="_self"  class="fl-button" > <span class="fl-button-text">Academics Programming</span> <i class="fl-button-icon fl-button-icon-after fas fa-angles-right" aria-hidden="true"></i> </a></div></div></div><div class="fl-col fl-node-jk1ie4bf2hsg fl-col-bg-photo fl-col-small" data-node="jk1ie4bf2hsg"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-photo fl-node-749j3xknrmzl fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center fl-row-bg-overlay" data-node="749j3xknrmzl"><div class="fl-row-content-wrap"><div class="fl-row-content fl-row-fixed-width fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-qdwuviorcf12" data-node="qdwuviorcf12"><div class="fl-col fl-node-ka1nxb9p4osy fl-col-bg-color fl-col-has-cols" data-node="ka1nxb9p4osy"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-h9cjw364g5rv" data-node="h9cjw364g5rv"><h1 class=" vc_custom_heading addshadow vc_custom_1531191707508" style="text-align: center;">Elevations Program Overview Video</h1></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-kgwea89ld7hx" data-node="kgwea89ld7hx"><p style="text-align: center;">Elevations RTC helps families from all over the country. data-node="ouwkxzl3241g"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><h2  class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-heading fl-heading-text fl-node-eozxi2catlnf" data-node="eozxi2catlnf"> Residential Treatment Centers Offer Hope to Families</h2><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-fe6msbwghxrq fl-animation fl-fade-in" data-node="fe6msbwghxrq" data-animation-delay="0.0" data-animation-duration="1"><p>What makes Elevations one of the premier residential treatment centers? With a focus aimed exclusively at adolescents ages 13 – 18, we are able to provide a unique combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical programming to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.</p><p>All of this takes place in a medically comprehensive residential environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence and reconnect with their life.</p><p>​Elevations does not and shall not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion (creed), gender, gender expression, age, national origin (ancestry), disability, marital status, sexual orientation, or military status, in any of its activities or operations.</p></div> data-node="2gkif8wtq5sv"><p>Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.</p></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-o0aiprlyjzc9" data-node="o0aiprlyjzc9"><p style="text-align: center;">- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-none fl-node-gfed8q3puz17 fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center fl-visible-desktop peakssection" data-node="gfed8q3puz17"><div class="fl-row-content-wrap"><div class="fl-row-content fl-row-fixed-width fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ijm3teoa6cf2" data-node="ijm3teoa6cf2"><div class="fl-col fl-node-4qoz17ajl96d fl-col-bg-color" data-node="4qoz17ajl96d"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-c27p3vzayiku" data-node="c27p3vzayiku"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h2 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">The 5 Peaks of Elevations</span></h2></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ktwyb15sn9jd" data-node="ktwyb15sn9jd"><div class="fl-col fl-node-qkyx7epa8mvu fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="qkyx7epa8mvu"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-flip-box fl-node-d50opbyjzcqg" data-node="d50opbyjzcqg"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-flip-box-wrap"><div class="uabb-flip-box  horizontal_flip_left uabb-jq-height"><div class="uabb-flip-box uabb-flip-box-outter"><div class="uabb-face uabb-front "><div class="uabb-flip-box-section uabb-flip-box-section-vertical-middle"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-imgicon-wrap"><div class="uabb-image

data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height pages.rawText:
Elevations RTC - One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 Skip to content 
 

 
 
 (855) 290-9681 
 

 

 

 

 About 
 
 Success Stories 

 Accreditation & Expertise 

 Outcomes 

 Videos 

 Testimonials 

 Safety 
 

 Clinical 
 
 Psychiatric/Medical Care 

 Types of Therapy 

 Family Support 

 Relationships 

 Transitions 
 

 Academics 
 
 Accredited Academics 

 Learning Support 

 Curriculum 
 

 Community 
 
 Campus 

 Virtual Tour 

 Supportive & Inviting 

 Recreation Programming 
 

 Team 

 Admissions 
 
 Student Profile 

 FAQ 

 Typical Day 

 Parent Resources 

 Transitioning From Wilderness 
 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 Rediscovering

 The Person They are

What is Elevations RTC: One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers

Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From  depression  to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.

Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a  medically comprehensive residential treatment centers  environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.

 Read Real Success Stories from our Families 

 Read More 

 Are you struggling to find the right help for your teen?

The professional clinicians at Elevations residential treatment centers have served as guardians of change for adolescents struggling to find hope and acceptance. Every day, our skilled and passionate professionals encourage students to build upon their strengths and abandon self-defeating behaviors. Because of this, our clinicians are among the most sought out group of professionals in the industry, garnishing referrals from both parents and professionals alike.

 When you send your child to Elevations RTC, one of the leading residential treatment centers,  you can be confident that they will receive the most advanced therapeutic intervention possible.   The problems they face in today’s world are very complicated and because of this, their struggle to regain a sure foundation requires a well tailored and proven approach.

 
 Student Profile 

 

Elevations RTC is a normalized high school in a nurturing  residential treatment centers  environment. We have teachers who directly teach concepts instead of students having to learn through packets or assignments. Elevations RTC also offers a all gender environment.

Elevations RTC teaches students practical study skills which will empower them to succeed in education long after leaving this setting. We teach critical thinking, organization, note-taking, setting goals and monitoring progress, recognizing priorities, maximizing use of time, discovering confidence, and envisioning success.

Our teaching  staff  will not only help your child learn, but will provide them with the tools to be successful in high school, college or beyond.

 
 Academics Programming 

Elevations Program Overview Video

Elevations RTC helps families from all over the country. Take a look at what parents and students have to say about our program.

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 Residential Treatment Centers Offer Hope to Families

What makes Elevations one of the premier residential treatment centers? With a focus aimed exclusively at adolescents ages 13 – 18, we are able to provide a unique combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care. We offer specialized clinical programming to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a medically comprehensive residential environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence and reconnect with their life.

​Elevations does not and shall not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion (creed), gender, gender expression, age, national origin (ancestry), disability, marital status, sexual orientation, or military status, in any of its activities or operations.

 
 Why Choose Elevations RTC 

 CONTACT US TODAY TO HELP YOUR CHILD 

REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE TO MEANT TO BECOME.

 Contact Us 

Diversity, Inclusion, and Belonging

Our statement on promoting acceptance

Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.

- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team

 The 5 Peaks of Elevations 

 

Peak 1: Relationship Model

 

Every aspect of Elevations is driven by a relationship model where we seek to repair family and peer relationships.

 
 
 

 

Peak 2 : Therapeutic

 

Elevations provides a highly professional, therapeutic program which is supported by our accredited staff.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 3 : Engaging

 

Elevations offers amazing opportunities for students to experience clinically supported adventure therapy.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 4 : Valuable

 

At Elevations, we know that there is no price that you can put on the success and happiness of your child.

 
 
 

 

Peak 5 : Future Oriented

 

At Elevations, we can help your teen find their success for college and beyond.

 
 
 

 
 
 

Need programming specifically developed for Neurodivergence and Autism?

 DISCOVER SEVEN STARS 

 
 
 

Need transition programming to practice autonomous living skills?

 THE APPROACH HOME 

 
 

 

 Row wavy Shape Decorative svg added to bottom 
 
 

 Explore 

 
 About 

 Clinical 

 Academics 

 Community 

 Team 

 Admissions 

 FAQ 

 Blog 
 

 Features 

 
 Academics 

 Psychiatric Services 

 Recreation Programming 

 Transition Program | The Approach 

 Autism+ Program | Seven Stars 
 

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

 © 2026 Elevations RTC. All rights reserved.

 
 Privacy Policy

Our team is full of highly experienced, trained and successful professionals who truly have a passion for helping teens and families in need.</p><p>Residential treatment centers offer help for teens struggling with a wide range of emotional issues that are not limited solely to any one disorder.</p><p>Out of the many reasons to choose a residential treatment center for your child, perhaps the most important is the fact that residential treatment provides 24/7 professional support. A highly-trained, warm staff ensures that your child receives the best care possible during their Elevations adventure. At Elevations, your child is not simply another “patient” — they are a member of the family.</p><p>A stay at Elevations provides your child with an opportunity to experience numerous activities and make new friends, while embarking on their therapeutic journey. The skills learned and memories formed at Elevations last a lifetime.</p><p>Choosing a residential treatment center for your child can make the difference in helping them return to a healthy path. Although growing up can be hard, Elevations can make the transition into adulthood easier for the entire family. With the help of Elevations RTC, your child will be well-prepared to face the future.</p><p>At Elevations RTC, we strive to provide the best service to parents. If parents are in need of assistance arranging a transportation plan our team is available to help.</p></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-0lyqjp8cd6mu fl-col-group-nested" data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height Student Profile - Elevations RTC

 Student Profile 

Student Profile for Elevations RTC

IS ELEVATIONS THE RIGHT FIT FOR YOUR CHILD?

Elevations RTC, one of the top residential treatment centers , serves teens of all genders ages 13 -17 who are struggling with a wide range of issues, whether it be mental, behavioral or academic issues. Our team is full of highly experienced, trained and successful professionals who truly have a passion for helping teens and families in need.

Residential treatment centers offer help for teens struggling with a wide range of emotional issues that are not limited solely to any one disorder.

Out of the many reasons to choose a residential treatment center for your child, perhaps the most important is the fact that residential treatment provides 24/7 professional support. A highly-trained, warm staff ensures that your child receives the best care possible during their Elevations adventure. At Elevations, your child is not simply another “patient” — they are a member of the family.

A stay at Elevations provides your child with an opportunity to experience numerous activities and make new friends, while embarking on their therapeutic journey. The skills learned and memories formed at Elevations last a lifetime.

Choosing a residential treatment center for your child can make the difference in helping them return to a healthy path. Although growing up can be hard, Elevations can make the transition into adulthood easier for the entire family. With the help of Elevations RTC, your child will be well-prepared to face the future.

At Elevations RTC, we strive to provide the best service to parents. If parents are in need of assistance arranging a transportation plan our team is available to help.

 Apply Now

 CONTACT US TODAY TO HELP YOUR CHILD 

REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE TO MEANT TO BECOME.

 Contact Us 

 DOES THIS SOUND LIKE YOUR CHILD? 

 
 COMPLEX DIAGNOSES 

 
Possible biological and environmental factors

Mixed and conflicting diagnoses to date

Something wrong with “wiring”

Might be lacking full developmental history
 

 Learn More 

 
 DISRUPTIVE BEHAVIOR 

 
School suspension or refusal

Alcohol, drug, and/or sexual experimentation

Negatively impacting family dynamics

Attention seeking and “annoying”
 

 Learn More 

 
 NEGATIVE RELATIONSHIPS 

 
Socially immature

Poor peer group or lacking in any interactions

“Into the drama”

Lacking self-regulation skills
 
 

 Learn More 

 
 SCHOOL REFUSAL 

 
Depression, low self-esteem

Victim of bullying

Lacking in motivation or goals

Lying, deceitful
 
 

 Learn More 

 
 
 

Need programming specifically developed for Neurodivergence and Autism?

 DISCOVER SEVEN STARS 

 
 
 

Need transition programming to practice autonomous living skills?

 THE APPROACH HOME 

 
 

 

 Row wavy Shape Decorative svg added to bottom 
 
 

 Explore 

 
 About 

 Clinical 

 Academics

 FAQ 

 Blog 
 

 Features 

 
 Academics 

 Psychiatric Services 

 Recreation Programming 

 Transition Program | The Approach 

 Autism+ Program | Seven Stars 
 

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

Teen residential treatment centers strive to equip struggling individuals with the knowledge and tools to work through their issues. </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Residential treatment centers for teens often provide a number of therapies in order to give struggling adolescents the best treatment possible. These therapeutic options can range from equine therapy to cognitive-behavioral therapy to group therapy. All of these are used to fit the specific needs of each individual child. </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Some residential<a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/IMG_3587.jpg"><img decoding="async" class="size-medium wp-image-2361 alignright lazyload" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" data-src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/IMG_3587-300x200.jpg" alt="residential treatment centers for teens" width="300" height="200" /><noscript><img decoding="async" class="size-medium wp-image-2361 alignright lazyload" src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/IMG_3587-300x200.jpg" alt="residential treatment centers for teens" width="300" height="200" /></noscript></a> treatment centers for teens are geared towards helping a specific gender or set of behavioral or emotional issues. Some are all gender, some are gender specific. Some treat very severe mental illnesses, some treat less severe. Many residential treatment centers offer programming that work towards treating specific diagnoses. </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Overall, residential treatment centers for teens want to help individuals work through and overcome their specific emotional or behavioral issues by developing coping skills that can be transferred back home and used over a lifetime. </span></p><h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">Who do residential treatment centers for teens help?</span></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Residential treatment centers for teens sometimes treat individuals based on diagnosis, gender, or age. Some residential treatment centers focus on younger teens, some focus on older teens. Some treat teen girls, some treat teen boys. A large amount of residential treatment centers help teens struggling with behavioral and/or emotional issues such as: </span></p><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Defiance</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Anxiety</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Depression</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Trauma-related issues</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Obsessive/ compulsive</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Substance use</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Manipulative behaviors</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Anger management issues</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Difficulty focusing</span></li></ul><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Many <em>residential treatment centers for teens</em> provide programming designed specifically for diagnoses like ADHD, ODD, OCD, bipolar disorder, or school refusal. </span></p><h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">Benefits of residential treatment centers for teens</span></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Traditional therapy is not always a large enough intervention for struggling teens, which is why residential treatment centers exist. Residential treatment centers for teens offer many benefits to individuals and families:</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong>24/7 Care</strong>: Residential treatment centers for teens offer ‘round the clock care by trained staff. This is to make sure your child is in a safe environment at all times. This also allows staff to notice patterns and triggers to create a more aware, personalized therapeutic treatment.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong>Safe and Secure</strong>: The facilities created for residential treatment centers are designed to have the utmost safety so they have a secure environment for teens to make mistakes and grow.<a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/5-22GirlsZion-060.jpg"><img decoding="async" class="size-medium wp-image-2363 alignright lazyload" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" data-src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/5-22GirlsZion-060-300x225.jpg" alt="5-22GirlsZion 060" width="300" height="225" /><noscript><img decoding="async" class="size-medium wp-image-2363 alignright lazyload" src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/5-22GirlsZion-060-300x225.jpg" alt="5-22GirlsZion 060" width="300" height="225" /></noscript></a> </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong> Accredited Academic Programs</strong>: Many residential treatment centers provide academic programs so that students will not fall behind while receiving therapeutic treatment. This also makes it easier for teens to transfer back home because there’s a sense of normalcy. </span></p><p><b>Individualized</b><strong style="font-weight: 400;"> Plans</strong>: Oftentimes residential treatment centers for teens strive to have a program that can cater to the needs to each individual student. To do this, they provide many different types of therapy to see which is more effective for each student.</p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong>Family Integration</strong>: To truly help a teen get through their issues, family support is needed. Residential treatment centers often work on repairing the family dynamic by offering family therapy and weekly communication with the family. </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong>Trained, Experienced Staff</strong>: These treatment centers are often staffed by therapeutic professionals with years of experience in dealing with struggling teens. They usually hire staff that are passionate about changing the lives of teens for the better. </span></p><h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">Elevations RTC as a residential treatment center for teens</span></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Elevations RTC is one of the leading all gender residential treatment centers for teens. Elevations offers support, guidance, and relief to teens of all genders, ages 13 to 18. Students at Elevations often struggle with issues surrounding mental health problems, learning disorders, substance use, emotional disorders, and more. </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Unlike many <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Residential_treatment_center">residential treatment centers for teens</a>, Elevations provides a real-world residential setting combined with psychiatric treatment and care. Elevations strives to teach each student coping skills that pertain specifically to their individual struggles in life. By offering accredited, college-prep academics, students are able to stay on track for a successful life. Elevations utilizes many types of therapy to give students the best possible care. These therapies can include adventure therapy, equine therapy, family therapy, individual therapy, and much more. </span></p><h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">Residential treatment in the media</span></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Residential treatment centers are often used for helping with anything from major depression to eating disorder to substance use. They have the potential to help a lot of people. Which is why <a href="https://www.mtv.com/news/1719874/kesha-rehab-eating-disorder/">Ke$ha</a>, well-known pop-singer, checked herself into a residential treatment facility to get help for her eating disorder. She was quoted saying, “I’m a crusader for being yourself and loving yourself, but I’ve found it hard to practice.” She said she entered residential treatment to help her “love herself” again.<a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/03/oct-26-pumpkin-carving-004-2.jpg"><img decoding="async" class="size-medium wp-image-2048 alignleft lazyload" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" data-src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/03/oct-26-pumpkin-carving-004-2-300x250.jpg" alt="oct 26 pumpkin carving 004 2" width="300" height="250" /><noscript><img decoding="async" class="size-medium wp-image-2048 alignleft lazyload" src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/03/oct-26-pumpkin-carving-004-2-300x250.jpg" alt="oct 26 pumpkin carving 004 2" width="300" height="250" /></noscript></a> </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;"><a href="https://www.elle.com/culture/celebrities/news/a31029/demi-lovato-mental-health/">Another pop idol</a> that has experienced time in residential treatment is Demi Lovato. She’s struggled with suicidal thoughts, self-harm, eating disorders, anxiety, and depression. Finally, after a violent episode, she got treatment in a residential treatment center for teens. There, she found out that she had bipolar disorder. Now, she has recovered, is successful, and, though she struggles sometimes, she’s living a much happier life. </span></p><h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">Research </span></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">In a recent study published by <a href="https://archpsyc.jamanetwork.com/article.aspx?articleid=2517515">JAMA Psychiatry</a>, it was found that mindfulness-based cognitive therapy is effective as a way to prevent relapses in depression. Mindfulness-based cognitive therapy is a combination of traditional cognitive behavioral therapy with mindfulness training. Mindfulness training helps an individual become more aware of their feelings and surroundings, making it easier to catch depression symptoms.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">In a survey done by the <a href="https://www.nimh.nih.gov/health/statistics/prevalence/any-anxiety-disorder-among-children.shtml">National Institutes of Mental Health</a>, it was found that over 25 percent of teens, ages 13 to 18, struggle with anxiety. That’s one out of every four teenagers that you come across, and many of them never get treatment. Girls were more likely than boys to develop an anxiety disorder. </span></p><h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">Residential treatment centers for teens defined by</span></h2><p><a href="https://www.yourlittleprofessor.com/lexicon/residential-treatment-centers-for-teens/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Your Little Professor</span></a></p><p><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Residential_treatment_center"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Wikipedia</span></a></p></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-separator fl-node-u8cxvz176se4" data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height Residential Treatment Centers for Teens - Elevations RTC 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 Skip to content 
 

 
 
 (855) 290-9681

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 
 

 Residential Treatment Centers for Teens 

 What are residential treatment centers for teens? 

 Residential treatment centers for teens are inpatient facilities made specifically for individuals grappling with behavioral and/or emotional issues. Residential treatment centers for teens usually offer a wide variety of therapeutic treatment options, an accredited academic program, and are staffed by a team of expert therapists and passionate supervisors. Teen residential treatment centers strive to equip struggling individuals with the knowledge and tools to work through their issues. 

 Residential treatment centers for teens often provide a number of therapies in order to give struggling adolescents the best treatment possible. These therapeutic options can range from equine therapy to cognitive-behavioral therapy to group therapy. All of these are used to fit the specific needs of each individual child. 

 Some residential treatment centers for teens are geared towards helping a specific gender or set of behavioral or emotional issues. Some are all gender, some are gender specific. Some treat very severe mental illnesses, some treat less severe. Many residential treatment centers offer programming that work towards treating specific diagnoses. 

 Overall, residential treatment centers for teens want to help individuals work through and overcome their specific emotional or behavioral issues by developing coping skills that can be transferred back home and used over a lifetime. 

 Who do residential treatment centers for teens help? 

 Residential treatment centers for teens sometimes treat individuals based on diagnosis, gender, or age. Some residential treatment centers focus on younger teens, some focus on older teens. Some treat teen girls, some treat teen boys. A large amount of residential treatment centers help teens struggling with behavioral and/or emotional issues such as: 
 
 Defiance 

 Anxiety 

 Depression 

 Trauma-related issues 

 Obsessive/ compulsive 

 Substance use 

 Manipulative behaviors 

 Anger management issues 

 Difficulty focusing 
 
 Many residential treatment centers for teens provide programming designed specifically for diagnoses like ADHD, ODD, OCD, bipolar disorder, or school refusal. 

 Benefits of residential treatment centers for teens 

 Traditional therapy is not always a large enough intervention for struggling teens, which is why residential treatment centers exist. Residential treatment centers for teens offer many benefits to individuals and families: 

 24/7 Care : Residential treatment centers for teens offer ‘round the clock care by trained staff. This is to make sure your child is in a safe environment at all times. This also allows staff to notice patterns and triggers to create a more aware, personalized therapeutic treatment. 

 Safe and Secure : The facilities created for residential treatment centers are designed to have the utmost safety so they have a secure environment for teens to make mistakes and grow. 

 Accredited Academic Programs : Many residential treatment centers provide academic programs so that students will not fall behind while receiving therapeutic treatment. This also makes it easier for teens to transfer back home because there’s a sense of normalcy. 

 Individualized  Plans : Oftentimes residential treatment centers for teens strive to have a program that can cater to the needs to each individual student. To do this, they provide many different types of therapy to see which is more effective for each student.

 Family Integration : To truly help a teen get through their issues, family support is needed. Residential treatment centers often work on repairing the family dynamic by offering family therapy and weekly communication with the family. 

 Trained, Experienced Staff : These treatment centers are often staffed by therapeutic professionals with years of experience in dealing with struggling teens. They usually hire staff that are passionate about changing the lives of teens for the better. 

 Elevations RTC as a residential treatment center for teens 

 Elevations RTC is one of the leading all gender residential treatment centers for teens. Elevations offers support, guidance, and relief to teens of all genders, ages 13 to 18. Students at Elevations often struggle with issues surrounding mental health problems, learning disorders, substance use, emotional disorders, and more. 

 Unlike many residential treatment centers for teens , Elevations provides a real-world residential setting combined with psychiatric treatment and care. Elevations strives to teach each student coping skills that pertain specifically to their individual struggles in life. By offering accredited, college-prep academics, students are able to stay on track for a successful life. Elevations utilizes many types of therapy to give students the best possible care. These therapies can include adventure therapy, equine therapy, family therapy, individual therapy, and much more. 

 Residential treatment in the media 

 Residential treatment centers are often used for helping with anything from major depression to eating disorder to substance use. They have the potential to help a lot of people. Which is why Ke$ha , well-known pop-singer, checked herself into a residential treatment facility to get help for her eating disorder. She was quoted saying, “I’m a crusader for being yourself and loving yourself, but I’ve found it hard to practice.” She said she entered residential treatment to help her “love herself” again. 

 Another pop idol that has experienced time in residential treatment is Demi Lovato. She’s struggled with suicidal thoughts, self-harm, eating disorders, anxiety, and depression. Finally, after a violent episode, she got treatment in a residential treatment center for teens. There, she found out that she had bipolar disorder. Now, she has recovered, is successful, and, though she struggles sometimes, she’s living a much happier life. 

 Research 

 In a recent study published by JAMA Psychiatry , it was found that mindfulness-based cognitive therapy is effective as a way to prevent relapses in depression. Mindfulness-based cognitive therapy is a combination of traditional cognitive behavioral therapy with mindfulness training. Mindfulness training helps an individual become more aware of their feelings and surroundings, making it easier to catch depression symptoms. 

 In a survey done by the National Institutes of Mental Health , it was found that over 25 percent of teens, ages 13 to 18, struggle with anxiety. That’s one out of every four teenagers that you come across, and many of them never get treatment. Girls were more likely than boys to develop an anxiety disorder. 

 Residential treatment centers for teens defined by 

 Your Little Professor 

 Wikipedia 

 Posted in

 

The Elevations Team

Want to learn more about how Elevations can guide your teen with specialized, compassionate care?  Contact us today !

 
Posts navigation

 ← Treatment Centers for Depression 

 RTCs vs. Boot Camps → 

 

 

 Row wavy Shape Decorative svg added to bottom

 Features 

 
 Academics 

 Psychiatric Services 

 Recreation Programming 

 Transition Program | The Approach 

 Autism+ Program | Seven Stars 
 

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

data-node="97w1mhsgrkje"><p>Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From <a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/depression-treatment-centers/">depression</a> to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.</p><p>Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.</p><p>All of this takes place in a <strong>medically comprehensive residential treatment centers</strong> environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width data-node="k60gudymaqw9"><h3 style="text-align: center;">Our statement on promoting acceptance</h3></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-2gkif8wtq5sv" data-node="2gkif8wtq5sv"><p>Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.</p></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-o0aiprlyjzc9" data-node="o0aiprlyjzc9"><p style="text-align: center;">- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-none fl-node-gfed8q3puz17 fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center fl-visible-desktop peakssection" data-node="gfed8q3puz17"><div class="fl-row-content-wrap"><div class="fl-row-content fl-row-fixed-width fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ijm3teoa6cf2" data-node="ijm3teoa6cf2"><div class="fl-col fl-node-4qoz17ajl96d fl-col-bg-color" data-node="4qoz17ajl96d"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-c27p3vzayiku" data-node="c27p3vzayiku"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h2 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">The 5 Peaks of Elevations</span></h2></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ktwyb15sn9jd" data-node="ktwyb15sn9jd"><div class="fl-col fl-node-qkyx7epa8mvu fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="qkyx7epa8mvu"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-flip-box fl-node-d50opbyjzcqg" data-node="d50opbyjzcqg"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-flip-box-wrap"><div class="uabb-flip-box  horizontal_flip_left uabb-jq-height"><div class="uabb-flip-box uabb-flip-box-outter"><div class="uabb-face uabb-front "><div class="uabb-flip-box-section uabb-flip-box-section-vertical-middle"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-imgicon-wrap"><div class="uabb-image

data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height pages.rawText:
Elevations RTC - One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 Skip to content 
 

 
 
 (855) 290-9681 
 

 

 

 

 About

 Accreditation & Expertise 

 Outcomes

 Testimonials 

 Safety

 Types of Therapy 

 Family Support

 Curriculum 
 

 Community 
 
 Campus

 Team

 Student Profile 

 FAQ 

 Typical Day 

 Parent Resources 

 Transitioning From Wilderness 
 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 Rediscovering

 The Person They are

What is Elevations RTC: One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers

Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From  depression  to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.

Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a  medically comprehensive residential treatment centers  environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.

 Read Real Success Stories from our Families 

 Read More 

 Are you struggling to find the right help for your teen?

The professional clinicians at Elevations residential treatment centers have served as guardians of change for adolescents struggling to find hope and acceptance. Every day, our skilled and passionate professionals encourage students to build upon their strengths and abandon self-defeating behaviors. Because of this, our clinicians are among the most sought out group of professionals in the industry, garnishing referrals from both parents and professionals alike.

 When you send your child to Elevations RTC, one of the leading residential treatment centers,  you can be confident that they will receive the most advanced therapeutic intervention possible.   The problems they face in today’s world are very complicated and because of this, their struggle to regain a sure foundation requires a well tailored and proven approach.

 
 Student Profile 

 

Elevations RTC is a normalized high school in a nurturing  residential treatment centers  environment. We have teachers who directly teach concepts instead of students having to learn through packets or assignments. Elevations RTC also offers a all gender environment.

Elevations RTC teaches students practical study skills which will empower them to succeed in education long after leaving this setting. We teach critical thinking, organization, note-taking, setting goals and monitoring progress, recognizing priorities, maximizing use of time, discovering confidence, and envisioning success.

Our teaching  staff  will not only help your child learn, but will provide them with the tools to be successful in high school, college or beyond.

 
 Academics Programming 

Elevations Program Overview Video

Elevations RTC helps families from all over the country. Take a look at what parents and students have to say about our program.

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 Residential Treatment Centers Offer Hope to Families

What makes Elevations one of the premier residential treatment centers? With a focus aimed exclusively at adolescents ages 13 – 18, we are able to provide a unique combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care. We offer specialized clinical programming to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a medically comprehensive residential environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence and reconnect with their life.

​Elevations does not and shall not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion (creed), gender, gender expression, age, national origin (ancestry), disability, marital status, sexual orientation, or military status, in any of its activities or operations.

 
 Why Choose Elevations RTC 

 CONTACT US TODAY TO HELP YOUR CHILD 

REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE TO MEANT TO BECOME.

 Contact Us 

Diversity, Inclusion, and Belonging

Our statement on promoting acceptance

Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.

- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team

 The 5 Peaks of Elevations 

 

Peak 1: Relationship Model

 

Every aspect of Elevations is driven by a relationship model where we seek to repair family and peer relationships.

 
 
 

 

Peak 2 : Therapeutic

 

Elevations provides a highly professional, therapeutic program which is supported by our accredited staff.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 3 : Engaging

 

Elevations offers amazing opportunities for students to experience clinically supported adventure therapy.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 4 : Valuable

 

At Elevations, we know that there is no price that you can put on the success and happiness of your child.

 
 
 

 

Peak 5 : Future Oriented

 

At Elevations, we can help your teen find their success for college and beyond.

 
 
 

 
 
 

Need programming specifically developed for Neurodivergence and Autism?

 DISCOVER SEVEN STARS 

 
 
 

Need transition programming to practice autonomous living skills?

 THE APPROACH HOME 

 
 

 

 Row wavy Shape Decorative svg added to bottom 
 
 

 Explore 

 
 About 

 Clinical 

 Academics 

 Community 

 Team 

 Admissions 

 FAQ 

 Blog 
 

 Features 

 
 Academics 

 Psychiatric Services 

 Recreation Programming 

 Transition Program | The Approach 

 Autism+ Program | Seven Stars 
 

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

 © 2026 Elevations RTC. All rights reserved.

hentry" id="fl-post-3157" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork"><div class="fl-post-content clearfix" itemprop="text"><div class="fl-builder-content fl-builder-content-3157 fl-builder-content-primary fl-builder-global-templates-locked" data-post-id="3157"><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-none fl-node-h6utjo7zpfb1 fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center" data-node="h6utjo7zpfb1"><div class="fl-row-content-wrap"><div class="fl-row-content fl-row-fixed-width fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-z730erju8hdt" data-node="z730erju8hdt"><div class="fl-col fl-node-15gwpvq79t6r fl-col-bg-color" data-node="15gwpvq79t6r"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-joswdcre4136" data-node="joswdcre4136"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h1 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">Comprehensive Guide to Programs for Struggling Teens: Choosing the Best Residential Treatment for Teens</span></h1></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-1zy9fki2cqg4" data-node="1zy9fki2cqg4"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Finding the right care for an adolescent in crisis can be challenging, especially when traditional therapy isn’t yielding results. Whether your child is navigating emotional, behavioral, or academic struggles, specialized therapeutic programs for teens can provide the expert guidance they need. This guide will cover what these programs offer and share more about why Elevations RTC is a trusted resource and an outstanding option for teens and families in need of comprehensive support.</span></p></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-bj3dgq9rwnmp" data-node="bj3dgq9rwnmp"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Programs for struggling teens offer a wide range of therapeutic services designed to address their unique challenges. These programs each serve families through different focus, approach, and target demographic. While not all programs incorporate therapeutic components, those that do aim to help teens navigate their struggles and develop effective coping strategies. The type of therapy provided often depends on factors such as the teen’s age, gender, or specific diagnoses, ensuring a tailored approach to their needs.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Many programs for troubled teens provide help for struggling youth by assisting them in the development of useful life skills like team-work, respect, self-awareness, accountability, and much more. The reason they focus on these types of skills is because they can transition with the teen back home and onward into the next stage of their life. When teens complete their therapy at a  treatment center, it doesn’t mean they’re suddenly “fixed,” it means they’ve learned all they can and now they need to go apply it in the real world. After a teen leaves a therapeutic program, they usually continue to attend regular therapeutic sessions to continue a less intensive treatment.</span></p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-rx9gzc817py6" data-node="rx9gzc817py6"><div class="fl-col fl-node-vh906pnfkezw fl-col-bg-color fl-col-has-cols" data-node="vh906pnfkezw"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-yrj7z5is8gp4" data-node="yrj7z5is8gp4"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h2 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">What Are Programs for Struggling Teens?</span></h2></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-pa3tw6inbrk7 fl-col-group-nested" data-node="pa3tw6inbrk7"><div class="fl-col fl-node-o8qbhku5xw14 fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="o8qbhku5xw14"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-eqz3lr4gmcwv" data-node="eqz3lr4gmcwv"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">When people search for "<em>programs for troubled teens</em>" they're typically looking for structured therapeutic environments that offer help for teens with mental health struggles or teens with behavioral issues. By blending clinical therapy, skill-building, and academics, these programs equip teens to overcome obstacles and transition successfully back into everyday life. Some examples include:</span></p><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Residential treatment centers (RTCs):</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Licensed care facility which provides 24/7 intensive therapeutic care in a structured setting,  including academic support.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Therapeutic boarding schools (TBS):</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Combine academic instruction with therapy to address mental health and emotional issues.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Wilderness therapy programs:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Use outdoor experiences to promote resilience and self-awareness, these programs are often seen as a sort of reset from daily life.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Day treatment and intensive outpatient programs (IOPs):</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Offer ongoing care while the teen lives at home.</span></li></ul></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col fl-node-8gmps5u6cwk2 fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="8gmps5u6cwk2"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div Centers?</span></h2></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-3s1md8x7q9ck" data-node="3s1md8x7q9ck"><div class="fl-col fl-node-xtgcm1hlr30w fl-col-bg-color fl-col-has-cols" data-node="xtgcm1hlr30w"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-6ptl0x5no1eg fl-col-group-nested" data-node="6ptl0x5no1eg"><div class="fl-col fl-node-oqkf9sz0c3ey fl-col-bg-color" data-node="oqkf9sz0c3ey"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-photo fl-node-yi8slo3d2ab5" data-node="yi8slo3d2ab5"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div role="figure" class="fl-photo fl-photo-align-center" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/ImageObject"><div class="fl-photo-content fl-photo-img-jpg"> <img decoding="async" class="fl-photo-img wp-image-11283 size-marvelous_hover_size_43 lazyload" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" data-src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/IMG_5208-640x480.jpg" alt="IMG_5208" height="480" width="640" title="IMG_5208"  itemprop="image" /><noscript><img decoding="async" class="fl-photo-img wp-image-11283 size-marvelous_hover_size_43 lazyload" src="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/IMG_5208-640x480.jpg" alt="IMG_5208" height="480" width="640" title="IMG_5208"  itemprop="image" /></noscript></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col fl-node-c7vjkx4oupf8 fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="c7vjkx4oupf8"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-f0rgkc6i5lub" data-node="f0rgkc6i5lub"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Programs for struggling teens are ideal for adolescents who face acute challenges such as:</span></p><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Mental health concerns:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, OCD, and PTSD.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Behavioral challenges:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Oppositional defiant disorder (ODD) and anger management issues.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Trauma or self-harm:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> History of trauma, suicidal ideation, or self-injury.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Attachment Issues: </b><span style="font-weight: 400;">Adoption issues and unhealthy relationships.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Learning difficulties:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> ADHD, dyslexia, or executive functioning challenges.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Substance use:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Struggles with substance abuse or addiction.</span></li></ul><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">These programs are most effective for adolescents aged 13 to 17 and address a variety of diagnoses to meet each teen’s unique needs.</span></p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-z1x3evmtq0wc" data-node="z1x3evmtq0wc"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><h2><b>Why Choose Inpatient Care or Residential Treatment for Adolescents?</b></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If traditional therapy hasn't met your family's needs, more structured programs can provide a deeper, more specialized approach. The benefits include:</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you’re in the process of finding help and your teen is having difficulties managing their daily life, you’ve probably tried everything available in traditional therapy. Inpatient care can provide a deeper, more specialized approach with longer-term outcomes for acute cases. They combine clinical therapy with integrative skill development to form a more intensive, elaborate, and specialized intervention for your child. Some beneficial aspects of high-quality treatment programs for struggling teens include:</span></p><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Highly Skilled Staff:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Expert therapists and counselors trained in adolescent mental health provide individualized attention and care. A low student to staff ratio is important to create a sage, supervised environment for your child. Milieu staff undergo trainings to manage deescalation, crisis management, and trauma-informed relational skills.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Family Integration:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Quality programs include family therapy sessions, regular phone calls, visits, and should require family involvement. Family involvement is shown to strengthen support systems and improve long-term outcomes.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Holistic Treatment Approaches:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Programs often use cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), group therapy, and experiential learning for comprehensive support. When choosing a program, it should offer therapy that specifically addresses your child's needs.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Transferrable Skill Development:</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> Staff want to ensure teens are able to bring home the skills they learn in treatment. Teens gain practical skills and healthy coping mechanisms like emotional regulation, accountability, and resilience that they can practice in everyday life.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><b>Carefully Designed Programming</b><span style="font-weight: 400;">: Specialized programs often don’t accept a wide age range because each age group requires a different set of therapeutic techniques. (Something that works for a 7 year old most likely won’t work for a 17 year old.)  However, programs may have separate wings for different age groups. Specialized therapy centers carefully select which clinical modalities they’ll include in their offerings, along with the environment that would be the most beneficial.</span></li></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-rn73oj16hyl2" data-node="rn73oj16hyl2"><div class="fl-col fl-node-0mh4f8p13ls5 fl-col-bg-color fl-col-has-cols" data-node="0mh4f8p13ls5"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-n859sxeqz4j7" data-node="n859sxeqz4j7"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h2 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">Elevations RTC: Inclusive Community and Comprehensive Care for Struggling Teens</span></h2></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-p2l1usi0cz43 fl-col-group-nested" data-node="p2l1usi0cz43"><div class="fl-col fl-node-mt9lfeby1pzr fl-col-bg-color" data-node="mt9lfeby1pzr"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-7j5xazpnokfq" data-node="7j5xazpnokfq"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">There are many options when it comes to therapeutic support for teens, but Elevations RTC stands out as one of the nation’s leading high-outcome residential treatment centers and mental health boarding schools for teens ages 13 to 17. Located in Utah, Elevations serves families nationwide, offering clinically sophisticated therapeutic programming that support teens struggling with emotional, behavioral, and academic challenges.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">✅ Comprehensive and individualized treatment plans</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br /> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;"> ✅ Experienced, licensed therapists and educators</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br /> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;"> ✅ Safe, structured, and inclusive peer environment</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br /> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;"> ✅ Proven success stories from families nationwide</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br /> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;"> ✅ Full academic support with transition planning</span></p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col fl-node-ogu1m370fvj5 fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="ogu1m370fvj5"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-photo fl-node-jq349tzp7idv" data-node="jq349tzp7idv"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div role="figure" fl-node-content"><div class="fl-callout fl-callout-has-photo fl-callout-photo-above-title"><div class="fl-callout-content"><h2 class="fl-callout-title"><span class="fl-callout-title-text">Challlenges Addressed at Elevations RTC</span></h2><div class="fl-callout-text-wrap"><div class="fl-callout-text"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Our program supports teens dealing with a variety of difficulties, including:</span></p><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Depression and anxiety</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><span style="font-weight: 400;">ADHD, learning disorders, and neurodivergent profiles</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Oppositional defiance and behavioral issues</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Trauma and PTSD</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Self-harm and suicidal ideation</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Substance use and addiction</span></li></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-kqlf2wdxajt0" data-node="kqlf2wdxajt0"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><h3><b>What Makes Elevations RTC Unique?</b></h3><ol><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><h4><span style="font-weight: 400;">Inclusive, Real-World Environment</span></h4><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="2"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Unlike gender-exclusive programs, Elevations RTC offers an all-gender setting that mirrors life outside. Teens learn to interact and grow in diverse, supervised environments that prepare them for real-world dynamics.</span></li></ul></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><h4><span style="font-weight: 400;">Fully Integrated Academics</span></h4><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="2"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Many families searching for boarding schools for behavioral issues find that Elevations offers the perfect balance of therapy and academics. Licensed teachers and a dedicated school building ensure students maintain academic progress and even recover credits while receiving therapeutic support. Teens graduate with the tools to transition successfully back to traditional school settings.</span></li></ul></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><h4><span style="font-weight: 400;">Comprehensive Therapeutic Approaches</span></h4><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="2"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Elevations incorporates evidence-based therapies like CBT, DBT, and trauma-focused therapy, alongside family therapy, adventure therapy, and experiential methods.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="2"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Additional therapeutic options include equine therapy, team-building exercises, and creative arts, all fostering growth and confidence.</span></li></ul></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><h4><span style="font-weight: 400;">Adventure-Based Recreation Activities</span></h4><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="2"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Elevations offers many off-campus, adventurous opportunities that focus on experiential learning. These adventure therapy outings could be anything from camping and rock-climbing to rafting and snowboarding. This allows students to get outside of their comfort zone and accomplish something physical, which builds self-esteem.</span></li></ul></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><h4><span style="font-weight: 400;">Individualized Treatment Plans</span></h4><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="2"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Each student's treatment is tailored to their specific needs, ensuring the highest level of care and support for lasting results.</span></li></ul></li></ol></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-separator fl-node-o8d14mfhtw0p" data-node="o8d14mfhtw0p"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-separator"></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-6kc5jr4fvx28 fl-col-group-nested" data-node="6kc5jr4fvx28"><div class="fl-col fl-node-32r15mbaholq fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="32r15mbaholq"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-ciqlyvtmdxzr" data-node="ciqlyvtmdxzr"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><h3><strong>Advocating for Change in Teen Mental Health Care: Reforming Institutional Care</strong></h3><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Staff at Elevations are dedicated to improving standards of care for youth in residential treatment centers across the nation. The team regularly participates in political advocacy and legislation efforts to raise standards for regulation and licensing of congregate care across the nation. Children and teens are already a vulnerable demographic--- those struggling with mental or behavioral health are even more vulnerable. Elevations' team is in support of national legislation like the Stop Institutional Child Abuse Act (SICAA), as well as local legislation initiatives like S.B. 229, and S.B. 297.</span></p><p><a href="https://www.allkindsoftherapy.com/elevations-rtc-champions-legislative-efforts-to-protect-youth-and-transform-adolescent-care" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Read the press release here</a>.</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col fl-node-n1s7uvw45dey fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="n1s7uvw45dey"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-photo fl-node-p869wsf7dlb4" data-node="p869wsf7dlb4"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div role="figure" class="fl-photo fl-photo-align-center" itemscope
