fl-module-separator fl-node-dl5mniypr4fs" data-node="dl5mniypr4fs"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-separator"></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-kxuop42a7zc3" data-node="kxuop42a7zc3"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><h3><b>Why Families from Across the United States Choose Elevations RTC</b></h3><h4><i><span style="font-weight: 400;">Your Teen Doesn’t Need to Stay Local to Get Help</span></i></h4><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Many families begin by searching for “schools for troubled teens near me” or “therapeutic boarding school near me”—but the best care may not be right around the corner. Elevations RTC welcomes students from all over the U.S. who need more than what local programs offer.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">While we are located in Utah, families from across the U.S.—including places like New York, Las Vegas, Denver, Chicago, and Seattle—choose Elevations because of our deep clinical expertise and supportive environment. Many teens benefit most when they step away from home environments, often achieving breakthroughs that wouldn’t be possible in a local program.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">“For our daughter, Elevations offered the support she needed where local options fell short. The difference in her confidence and outlook is incredible.” — Parent from Virginia</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">"Local options weren’t working for our son. Getting him to Elevations changed everything." — Parent from California</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We understand that families searching for programs near cities like Kansas City, Phoenix, or Portland are looking for real help—not just the closest option. Elevations accepts students from across the nation, and is even S.E.V.I.S. approved for international students, making it possible to access the care your teen needs even if it means temporarily moving them out of state. </span></p><h2><b>Getting Started with Elevations RTC</b></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you’re searching for help for struggling teens, the team at </span><b>Elevations</b><span style="font-weight: 400;"> is here to answer any questions and provide guidance about your options. We understand the challenges you’re facing and are fully committed to helping both teens and families create brighter futures.</span></p></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-cta fl-node-dasijrxumy16" data-node="dasijrxumy16"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-cta-wrap fl-cta-inline"><div class="fl-cta-text"><h3 class="fl-cta-title">Contact Us Today</h3><div class="fl-cta-text-content"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Your family’s support system starts here. Call us today at </span><b>855-290-9681 </b><span style="font-weight: 400;">to speak with an admissions specialist. Don’t wait to take the next step toward healing and growth.</span></p></div></div><div class="fl-cta-button"><div  class="fl-button-wrap fl-button-width-full fl-button-has-icon"> <a href="tel:8552909681"  target="_self"  class="fl-button" > <i class="fl-button-icon fl-button-icon-before fas fa-phone" aria-hidden="true"></i> <span class="fl-button-text">Call Now</span> </a></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-n0c8ey9bqu2i" data-node="n0c8ey9bqu2i"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><h2><b>Real Stories Highlight the Importance of Getting Help</b></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">In a </span><a href="https://people.com/demi-lovato-talks-finding-hope-after-five-in-patient-mental-health-treatments-felt-defeated-8657467" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">recent </span><i><span style="font-weight: 400;">People</span></i><span style="font-weight: 400;"> interview</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, singer and mental health advocate Demi Lovato opened up about attending five different inpatient mental health programs throughout her life. She candidly shared that, while she once felt defeated by the process, she finally found hope and stability once she truly put in the work. Her story reflects the emotional journey many teens and families face when navigating mental health challenges. </span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Lovato's experience shows that healing isn't always linear, but with the right care and support, recovery is possible. Programs like Elevations RTC offer the type of structured, long-term support that can make all the difference for teens who are struggling and need a fresh start.</span></p><h3><b>Rising Demand for Adolescent Mental Health Services</b></h3><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Recent data from the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA) highlights a significant </span><a href="https://thehill.com/policy/healthcare/4800779-mental-health-treatment-us-adolescents-teenagers/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">increase in adolescents seeking mental health treatment</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">. In 2023, nearly one-third (31.9%) of U.S. adolescents aged 12 to 17 received some form of mental health care, up from 29.8% in 2022. This upward trend shows a growing recognition of the importance of mental health and a reduction in the stigma associated with seeking help. At Elevations, we are committed to providing support to meet the needs of youth in crisis.</span></p><h2><b>Backed by Research and Proven Results</b></h2><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Studies show that early intervention and mental health treatment lead to significantly better outcomes for teens:</span></p><ul><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/clinical/types-of-therapy/#:~:text=Cognitive%20Behavioral%20Therapy%20(CBT)" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Cognitive behavioral therapy</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> has been proven to enhance focus, emotional regulation, and problem-solving in adolescents.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400;" aria-level="1"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Addressing </span><a href="https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2016/01/160120201324.htm" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">childhood trauma</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> early helps reduce the chances of long-term mental health challenges.</span></li></ul><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Elevations takes a research-driven and trauma-informed approach, ensuring families receive the tools they need to succeed both during and after treatment.</span></p></div></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-button-group fl-node-k1d9t0yfbiur" data-node="k1d9t0yfbiur"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-button-group fl-button-group-layout-horizontal data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height Programs for Troubled Teens - Elevations RTC

 (855) 290-9681

 Comprehensive Guide to Programs for Struggling Teens: Choosing the Best Residential Treatment for Teens 

 Finding the right care for an adolescent in crisis can be challenging, especially when traditional therapy isn’t yielding results. Whether your child is navigating emotional, behavioral, or academic struggles, specialized therapeutic programs for teens can provide the expert guidance they need. This guide will cover what these programs offer and share more about why Elevations RTC is a trusted resource and an outstanding option for teens and families in need of comprehensive support. 

 Programs for struggling teens offer a wide range of therapeutic services designed to address their unique challenges. These programs each serve families through different focus, approach, and target demographic. While not all programs incorporate therapeutic components, those that do aim to help teens navigate their struggles and develop effective coping strategies. The type of therapy provided often depends on factors such as the teen’s age, gender, or specific diagnoses, ensuring a tailored approach to their needs. 

 Many programs for troubled teens provide help for struggling youth by assisting them in the development of useful life skills like team-work, respect, self-awareness, accountability, and much more. The reason they focus on these types of skills is because they can transition with the teen back home and onward into the next stage of their life. When teens complete their therapy at a  treatment center, it doesn’t mean they’re suddenly “fixed,” it means they’ve learned all they can and now they need to go apply it in the real world. After a teen leaves a therapeutic program, they usually continue to attend regular therapeutic sessions to continue a less intensive treatment. 

 What Are Programs for Struggling Teens? 

 When people search for " programs for troubled teens " they're typically looking for structured therapeutic environments that offer help for teens with mental health struggles or teens with behavioral issues. By blending clinical therapy, skill-building, and academics, these programs equip teens to overcome obstacles and transition successfully back into everyday life. Some examples include: 
 
 Residential treatment centers (RTCs): Licensed care facility which provides 24/7 intensive therapeutic care in a structured setting,  including academic support. 

 Therapeutic boarding schools (TBS): Combine academic instruction with therapy to address mental health and emotional issues. 

 Wilderness therapy programs: Use outdoor experiences to promote resilience and self-awareness, these programs are often seen as a sort of reset from daily life. 

 Day treatment and intensive outpatient programs (IOPs): Offer ongoing care while the teen lives at home. 
 

 

 Who Benefits from Teen Therapy and Residential Treatment Centers? 

 

 Programs for struggling teens are ideal for adolescents who face acute challenges such as: 
 
 Mental health concerns: Anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, OCD, and PTSD. 

 Behavioral challenges: Oppositional defiant disorder (ODD) and anger management issues. 

 Trauma or self-harm: History of trauma, suicidal ideation, or self-injury. 

 Attachment Issues: Adoption issues and unhealthy relationships. 

 Learning difficulties: ADHD, dyslexia, or executive functioning challenges. 

 Substance use: Struggles with substance abuse or addiction. 
 
 These programs are most effective for adolescents aged 13 to 17 and address a variety of diagnoses to meet each teen’s unique needs. 

 Why Choose Inpatient Care or Residential Treatment for Adolescents? 

 If traditional therapy hasn't met your family's needs, more structured programs can provide a deeper, more specialized approach. The benefits include: 

 If you’re in the process of finding help and your teen is having difficulties managing their daily life, you’ve probably tried everything available in traditional therapy. Inpatient care can provide a deeper, more specialized approach with longer-term outcomes for acute cases. They combine clinical therapy with integrative skill development to form a more intensive, elaborate, and specialized intervention for your child. Some beneficial aspects of high-quality treatment programs for struggling teens include: 
 
 Highly Skilled Staff: Expert therapists and counselors trained in adolescent mental health provide individualized attention and care. A low student to staff ratio is important to create a sage, supervised environment for your child. Milieu staff undergo trainings to manage deescalation, crisis management, and trauma-informed relational skills. 

 Family Integration: Quality programs include family therapy sessions, regular phone calls, visits, and should require family involvement. Family involvement is shown to strengthen support systems and improve long-term outcomes. 

 Holistic Treatment Approaches: Programs often use cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), group therapy, and experiential learning for comprehensive support. When choosing a program, it should offer therapy that specifically addresses your child's needs. 

 Transferrable Skill Development: Staff want to ensure teens are able to bring home the skills they learn in treatment. Teens gain practical skills and healthy coping mechanisms like emotional regulation, accountability, and resilience that they can practice in everyday life. 

 Carefully Designed Programming : Specialized programs often don’t accept a wide age range because each age group requires a different set of therapeutic techniques. (Something that works for a 7 year old most likely won’t work for a 17 year old.)  However, programs may have separate wings for different age groups. Specialized therapy centers carefully select which clinical modalities they’ll include in their offerings, along with the environment that would be the most beneficial. 
 

 Elevations RTC: Inclusive Community and Comprehensive Care for Struggling Teens 

 There are many options when it comes to therapeutic support for teens, but Elevations RTC stands out as one of the nation’s leading high-outcome residential treatment centers and mental health boarding schools for teens ages 13 to 17. Located in Utah, Elevations serves families nationwide, offering clinically sophisticated therapeutic programming that support teens struggling with emotional, behavioral, and academic challenges. 

 ✅ Comprehensive and individualized treatment plans 
 ✅ Experienced, licensed therapists and educators 
 ✅ Safe, structured, and inclusive peer environment 
 ✅ Proven success stories from families nationwide 
 ✅ Full academic support with transition planning 

 

 Challlenges Addressed at Elevations RTC 

 Our program supports teens dealing with a variety of difficulties, including: 
 
 Depression and anxiety 

 ADHD, learning disorders, and neurodivergent profiles 

 Oppositional defiance and behavioral issues 

 Trauma and PTSD 

 Self-harm and suicidal ideation 

 Substance use and addiction 
 

 What Makes Elevations RTC Unique? 
 

 Inclusive, Real-World Environment 
 
 Unlike gender-exclusive programs, Elevations RTC offers an all-gender setting that mirrors life outside. Teens learn to interact and grow in diverse, supervised environments that prepare them for real-world dynamics. 
 

 Fully Integrated Academics 
 
 Many families searching for boarding schools for behavioral issues find that Elevations offers the perfect balance of therapy and academics. Licensed teachers and a dedicated school building ensure students maintain academic progress and even recover credits while receiving therapeutic support. Teens graduate with the tools to transition successfully back to traditional school settings. 
 

 Comprehensive Therapeutic Approaches 
 
 Elevations incorporates evidence-based therapies like CBT, DBT, and trauma-focused therapy, alongside family therapy, adventure therapy, and experiential methods. 

 Additional therapeutic options include equine therapy, team-building exercises, and creative arts, all fostering growth and confidence. 
 

 Adventure-Based Recreation Activities 
 
 Elevations offers many off-campus, adventurous opportunities that focus on experiential learning. These adventure therapy outings could be anything from camping and rock-climbing to rafting and snowboarding. This allows students to get outside of their comfort zone and accomplish something physical, which builds self-esteem. 
 

 Individualized Treatment Plans 
 
 Each student's treatment is tailored to their specific needs, ensuring the highest level of care and support for lasting results. 
 
 

 Advocating for Change in Teen Mental Health Care: Reforming Institutional Care 

 Staff at Elevations are dedicated to improving standards of care for youth in residential treatment centers across the nation. The team regularly participates in political advocacy and legislation efforts to raise standards for regulation and licensing of congregate care across the nation. Children and teens are already a vulnerable demographic--- those struggling with mental or behavioral health are even more vulnerable. Elevations' team is in support of national legislation like the Stop Institutional Child Abuse Act (SICAA), as well as local legislation initiatives like S.B. 229, and S.B. 297. 

 Read the press release here .

 

 Why Families from Across the United States Choose Elevations RTC 

 Your Teen Doesn’t Need to Stay Local to Get Help 

 Many families begin by searching for “schools for troubled teens near me” or “therapeutic boarding school near me”—but the best care may not be right around the corner. Elevations RTC welcomes students from all over the U.S. who need more than what local programs offer. 

 While we are located in Utah, families from across the U.S.—including places like New York, Las Vegas, Denver, Chicago, and Seattle—choose Elevations because of our deep clinical expertise and supportive environment. Many teens benefit most when they step away from home environments, often achieving breakthroughs that wouldn’t be possible in a local program. 

 “For our daughter, Elevations offered the support she needed where local options fell short. The difference in her confidence and outlook is incredible.” — Parent from Virginia 

 "Local options weren’t working for our son. Getting him to Elevations changed everything." — Parent from California 

 We understand that families searching for programs near cities like Kansas City, Phoenix, or Portland are looking for real help—not just the closest option. Elevations accepts students from across the nation, and is even S.E.V.I.S. approved for international students, making it possible to access the care your teen needs even if it means temporarily moving them out of state.  

 Getting Started with Elevations RTC 

 If you’re searching for help for struggling teens, the team at Elevations is here to answer any questions and provide guidance about your options. We understand the challenges you’re facing and are fully committed to helping both teens and families create brighter futures. 

Contact Us Today

 Your family’s support system starts here. Call us today at 855-290-9681 to speak with an admissions specialist. Don’t wait to take the next step toward healing and growth. 

 Call Now 

 Real Stories Highlight the Importance of Getting Help 

 In a recent People interview , singer and mental health advocate Demi Lovato opened up about attending five different inpatient mental health programs throughout her life. She candidly shared that, while she once felt defeated by the process, she finally found hope and stability once she truly put in the work. Her story reflects the emotional journey many teens and families face when navigating mental health challenges.  

 Lovato's experience shows that healing isn't always linear, but with the right care and support, recovery is possible. Programs like Elevations RTC offer the type of structured, long-term support that can make all the difference for teens who are struggling and need a fresh start. 

 Rising Demand for Adolescent Mental Health Services 

 Recent data from the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA) highlights a significant increase in adolescents seeking mental health treatment . In 2023, nearly one-third (31.9%) of U.S. adolescents aged 12 to 17 received some form of mental health care, up from 29.8% in 2022. This upward trend shows a growing recognition of the importance of mental health and a reduction in the stigma associated with seeking help. At Elevations, we are committed to providing support to meet the needs of youth in crisis. 

 Backed by Research and Proven Results 

 Studies show that early intervention and mental health treatment lead to significantly better outcomes for teens: 
 
 Cognitive behavioral therapy has been proven to enhance focus, emotional regulation, and problem-solving in adolescents. 

 Addressing childhood trauma early helps reduce the chances of long-term mental health challenges. 
 
 Elevations takes a research-driven and trauma-informed approach, ensuring families receive the tools they need to succeed both during and after treatment. 

 Clinical Care at Elevations 

 Academics at Elevations 

 Student Profile 

 Contact Our Team

 Transition Program | The Approach 

 Autism+ Program | Seven Stars 
 

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

for struggling teens</a>, Elevations RTC has a tight knit community based in a comfortable, nurturing environment. Our campus has the feel of a small, private boarding school.  Unlike other <strong>residential treatment programs</strong>, large classrooms, library, climbing wall, full gym, art studio, athletic fields, dining room, and multiple residence halls, we have many amenities.</p><p>While this expansive campus is very useful for providing a comprehensive program it is still important we promote a community feel and personalization to promote a sense of normalcy unique to our program.</p></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-h9vakjmo475i fl-col-group-nested" This helps improve outcomes.</li><li style="text-align: left;">Academically strong and diverse, with college preparatory curriculum, tutoring, mentoring, plus elective offerings like health and renowned art programming.</li><li style="text-align: left;">Medically and therapeutically sophisticated with board certified medical doctor, plus 24/7 nurse, and psychiatrist on staff.</li></ul></div></div></div> <style>.fl-node-nf389hombc1x.fl-animation:not(.fl-animated){opacity:0}</style></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-color fl-node-58eo01frmpc4 fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center" data-node="58eo01frmpc4"><div class="fl-row-content-wrap"><div class="uabb-row-separator uabb-top-row-separator" ></div><div class="fl-row-content fl-row-full-width fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-cjuirbgwfn9o fl-col-group-equal-height fl-col-group-align-top fl-col-group-custom-width fl-col-group-medium-reversed fl-col-group-responsive-reversed" data-node="cjuirbgwfn9o"><div class="fl-col fl-node-udo89l1ve65q fl-col-bg-photo fl-col-small fl-col-small-custom-width" data-node="udo89l1ve65q"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"></div></div><div class="fl-col fl-node-iy59jcgtbvdm fl-col-bg-photo fl-col-small fl-col-small-custom-width" data-node="iy59jcgtbvdm"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-lyuvdknwi5a7" data-node="lyuvdknwi5a7"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h2 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">The Goal at Elevations</span></h2></div></div><div class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-node-ar7c43dfo1x2 fl-animation fl-fade-in" data-node="ar7c43dfo1x2" data-animation-delay="0.0" data-animation-duration="1"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>The main goal of Elevations RTC is to help teens develop an understanding that there are solutions to the struggles that complicate their lives. data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height pages.rawText:
Admissions - Elevations RTC 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 Skip to content 
 

 
 
 (855) 290-9681 
 

 

 

 

 About 
 
 Success Stories 

 Accreditation & Expertise 

 Outcomes 

 Videos 

 Testimonials 

 Safety 
 

 Clinical 
 
 Psychiatric/Medical Care 

 Types of Therapy 

 Family Support 

 Relationships 

 Transitions 
 

 Academics 
 
 Accredited Academics 

 Learning Support 

 Curriculum 
 

 Community 
 
 Campus 

 Virtual Tour 

 Supportive & Inviting 

 Recreation Programming 
 

 Team 

 Admissions 
 
 Student Profile 

 FAQ 

 Typical Day 

 Parent Resources 

 Transitioning From Wilderness 
 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 
 

 Admissions 

Elevations RTC Offers Hope to Families

HELP YOUR CHILD REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE

In a time of fear and uncertainty, Elevations offers hope for teens…and their families back home.

Elevations, one of the best  residential treatment centers for teens , is uniquely focused on providing a premier gender inclusive residential therapeutic experience for ages 13 – 18. We help our students re engage, reconnect, and rebuild their hope and confidence in their bright future.

 Student Profile 

 Steps To Apply 

 Typical Day 

 
 
 
 
 

Residential Treatment Center for Troubled Teens

HELP YOUR CHILD REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE

As one of the top  programs for struggling teens , Elevations RTC has a tight knit community based in a comfortable, nurturing environment. Our campus has the feel of a small, private boarding school.  Unlike other  residential treatment programs , large classrooms, library, climbing wall, full gym, art studio, athletic fields, dining room, and multiple residence halls, we have many amenities.

While this expansive campus is very useful for providing a comprehensive program it is still important we promote a community feel and personalization to promote a sense of normalcy unique to our program.

 Campus 

 Virtual Tour 

 Service 

 What Makes Elevations Special? 

It starts with the people.  When visitors come to campus they feel a connection and comfort.  It feels like family—with the staff, with the students, and the families back home. We welcome and encourage that connection in order to turn that concern about our teens into inspiration.

 

 APPLY NOW 

Elevations carefully reviews every application to ensure we are the right fit for the student and the family.

We encourage families to complete the application as a first step in determining if Elevations is the right placement and to make sure we have space available for the student.

 
 Start Your Application 

 

ELEVATIONS is

 

 
Specifically designed in programming and facilities to serve the unique and sometimes complex needs of our students.

Real world with a all gender environment that normalizes all relationships and eases transitions after a student’s time at Elevations is complete. This helps improve outcomes.

Academically strong and diverse, with college preparatory curriculum, tutoring, mentoring, plus elective offerings like health and renowned art programming.

Medically and therapeutically sophisticated with board certified medical doctor, plus 24/7 nurse, and psychiatrist on staff.
 

 

 The Goal at Elevations 

The main goal of Elevations RTC is to help teens develop an understanding that there are solutions to the struggles that complicate their lives. Through a proven model, our therapeutic care is provided in the most holistic, impassioned way possible.

We find that teens who have clinical issues such as mood and behavioral dysregulation, substance use, and difficulties at home/school, find success and recovery in our nurturing, pro-social environment.

 

 
 
 

Need programming specifically developed for Neurodivergence and Autism?

 DISCOVER SEVEN STARS 

 
 
 

Need transition programming to practice autonomous living skills?

 THE APPROACH HOME 

 Call us at (855) 290-9681 

From there, we can learn more about your child and how Elevations can help your child find success.

 CONTACT US TODAY TO HELP YOUR CHILD 

REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE TO MEANT TO BECOME.

 Contact Us 

 
 

 

 Row wavy Shape Decorative svg added to bottom 
 
 

 Explore 

 
 About 

 Clinical 

 Academics 

 Community 

 Team 

 Admissions 

 FAQ 

 Blog 
 

 Features 

 
 Academics 

 Psychiatric Services 

 Recreation Programming 

 Transition Program | The Approach 

 Autism+ Program | Seven Stars 
 

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

 © 2026 Elevations RTC. All rights reserved.

 
 Privacy Policy 

 Employment

data-node="97w1mhsgrkje"><p>Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From <a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/depression-treatment-centers/">depression</a> to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.</p><p>Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.</p><p>All of this takes place in a <strong>medically comprehensive residential treatment centers</strong> environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width data-node="k60gudymaqw9"><h3 style="text-align: center;">Our statement on promoting acceptance</h3></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-2gkif8wtq5sv" data-node="2gkif8wtq5sv"><p>Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.</p></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-o0aiprlyjzc9" data-node="o0aiprlyjzc9"><p style="text-align: center;">- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-none fl-node-gfed8q3puz17 fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center fl-visible-desktop peakssection" data-node="gfed8q3puz17"><div class="fl-row-content-wrap"><div class="fl-row-content fl-row-fixed-width fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ijm3teoa6cf2" data-node="ijm3teoa6cf2"><div class="fl-col fl-node-4qoz17ajl96d fl-col-bg-color" data-node="4qoz17ajl96d"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-c27p3vzayiku" data-node="c27p3vzayiku"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h2 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">The 5 Peaks of Elevations</span></h2></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ktwyb15sn9jd" data-node="ktwyb15sn9jd"><div class="fl-col fl-node-qkyx7epa8mvu fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="qkyx7epa8mvu"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-flip-box fl-node-d50opbyjzcqg" data-node="d50opbyjzcqg"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-flip-box-wrap"><div class="uabb-flip-box  horizontal_flip_left uabb-jq-height"><div class="uabb-flip-box uabb-flip-box-outter"><div class="uabb-face uabb-front "><div class="uabb-flip-box-section uabb-flip-box-section-vertical-middle"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-imgicon-wrap"><div class="uabb-image

data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height pages.rawText:
Elevations RTC - One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 Skip to content 
 

 
 
 (855) 290-9681 
 

 

 

 

 About 
 
 Success Stories 

 Accreditation & Expertise 

 Outcomes 

 Videos 

 Testimonials 

 Safety 
 

 Clinical 
 
 Psychiatric/Medical Care 

 Types of Therapy 

 Family Support 

 Relationships 

 Transitions 
 

 Academics 
 
 Accredited Academics 

 Learning Support 

 Curriculum 
 

 Community 
 
 Campus 

 Virtual Tour 

 Supportive & Inviting 

 Recreation Programming 
 

 Team 

 Admissions 
 
 Student Profile 

 FAQ 

 Typical Day 

 Parent Resources 

 Transitioning From Wilderness 
 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 Rediscovering

 The Person They are

What is Elevations RTC: One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers

Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From  depression  to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.

Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a  medically comprehensive residential treatment centers  environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.

 Read Real Success Stories from our Families 

 Read More 

 Are you struggling to find the right help for your teen?

The professional clinicians at Elevations residential treatment centers have served as guardians of change for adolescents struggling to find hope and acceptance. Every day, our skilled and passionate professionals encourage students to build upon their strengths and abandon self-defeating behaviors. Because of this, our clinicians are among the most sought out group of professionals in the industry, garnishing referrals from both parents and professionals alike.

 When you send your child to Elevations RTC, one of the leading residential treatment centers,  you can be confident that they will receive the most advanced therapeutic intervention possible.   The problems they face in today’s world are very complicated and because of this, their struggle to regain a sure foundation requires a well tailored and proven approach.

 
 Student Profile 

 

Elevations RTC is a normalized high school in a nurturing  residential treatment centers  environment. We have teachers who directly teach concepts instead of students having to learn through packets or assignments. Elevations RTC also offers a all gender environment.

Elevations RTC teaches students practical study skills which will empower them to succeed in education long after leaving this setting. We teach critical thinking, organization, note-taking, setting goals and monitoring progress, recognizing priorities, maximizing use of time, discovering confidence, and envisioning success.

Our teaching  staff  will not only help your child learn, but will provide them with the tools to be successful in high school, college or beyond.

 
 Academics Programming 

Elevations Program Overview Video

Elevations RTC helps families from all over the country. Take a look at what parents and students have to say about our program.

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 Residential Treatment Centers Offer Hope to Families

What makes Elevations one of the premier residential treatment centers? With a focus aimed exclusively at adolescents ages 13 – 18, we are able to provide a unique combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care. We offer specialized clinical programming to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a medically comprehensive residential environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence and reconnect with their life.

​Elevations does not and shall not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion (creed), gender, gender expression, age, national origin (ancestry), disability, marital status, sexual orientation, or military status, in any of its activities or operations.

 
 Why Choose Elevations RTC 

 CONTACT US TODAY TO HELP YOUR CHILD 

REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE TO MEANT TO BECOME.

 Contact Us 

Diversity, Inclusion, and Belonging

Our statement on promoting acceptance

Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.

- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team

 The 5 Peaks of Elevations 

 

Peak 1: Relationship Model

 

Every aspect of Elevations is driven by a relationship model where we seek to repair family and peer relationships.

 
 
 

 

Peak 2 : Therapeutic

 

Elevations provides a highly professional, therapeutic program which is supported by our accredited staff.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 3 : Engaging

 

Elevations offers amazing opportunities for students to experience clinically supported adventure therapy.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 4 : Valuable

 

At Elevations, we know that there is no price that you can put on the success and happiness of your child.

 
 
 

 

Peak 5 : Future Oriented

 

At Elevations, we can help your teen find their success for college and beyond.

 
 
 

 
 
 

Need programming specifically developed for Neurodivergence and Autism?

 DISCOVER SEVEN STARS 

 
 
 

Need transition programming to practice autonomous living skills?

 THE APPROACH HOME 

 
 

 

 Row wavy Shape Decorative svg added to bottom 
 
 

 Explore 

 
 About 

 Clinical 

 Academics 

 Community 

 Team 

 Admissions 

 FAQ 

 Blog 
 

 Features 

 
 Academics 

 Psychiatric Services 

 Recreation Programming 

 Transition Program | The Approach 

 Autism+ Program | Seven Stars 
 

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

 © 2026 Elevations RTC. All rights reserved.

data-node="97w1mhsgrkje"><p>Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From <a href="https://www.elevationsrtc.com/depression-treatment-centers/">depression</a> to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.</p><p>Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.</p><p>All of this takes place in a <strong>medically comprehensive residential treatment centers</strong> environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width data-node="k60gudymaqw9"><h3 style="text-align: center;">Our statement on promoting acceptance</h3></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-2gkif8wtq5sv" data-node="2gkif8wtq5sv"><p>Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.</p></div><div  class="fl-module fl-module-rich-text fl-rich-text fl-node-o0aiprlyjzc9" data-node="o0aiprlyjzc9"><p style="text-align: center;">- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-row fl-row-full-width fl-row-bg-none fl-node-gfed8q3puz17 fl-row-default-height fl-row-align-center fl-visible-desktop peakssection" data-node="gfed8q3puz17"><div class="fl-row-content-wrap"><div class="fl-row-content fl-row-fixed-width fl-node-content"><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ijm3teoa6cf2" data-node="ijm3teoa6cf2"><div class="fl-col fl-node-4qoz17ajl96d fl-col-bg-color" data-node="4qoz17ajl96d"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-heading fl-node-c27p3vzayiku" data-node="c27p3vzayiku"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><h2 class="fl-heading"> <span class="fl-heading-text">The 5 Peaks of Elevations</span></h2></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-ktwyb15sn9jd" data-node="ktwyb15sn9jd"><div class="fl-col fl-node-qkyx7epa8mvu fl-col-bg-color fl-col-small" data-node="qkyx7epa8mvu"><div class="fl-col-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-module fl-module-flip-box fl-node-d50opbyjzcqg" data-node="d50opbyjzcqg"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-flip-box-wrap"><div class="uabb-flip-box  horizontal_flip_left uabb-jq-height"><div class="uabb-flip-box uabb-flip-box-outter"><div class="uabb-face uabb-front "><div class="uabb-flip-box-section uabb-flip-box-section-vertical-middle"><div class="uabb-module-content uabb-imgicon-wrap"><div class="uabb-image

data-node="j894zsf1a265"><div class="fl-module-content fl-node-content"><div class="fl-rich-text"><p>Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="fl-col-group fl-node-r67yaejwn91b fl-col-group-equal-height Elevations RTC - One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 Skip to content 
 

 
 
 (855) 290-9681

 Transitioning From Wilderness 
 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 Rediscovering

 The Person They are

What is Elevations RTC: One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers

Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.  We help adolescents 13-18 overcome challenges stemming from mental health problems, emotional disorders, learning disorders, substance use, and  other underlying issues. From  depression  to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.

Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.  We offer specialized clinical groups to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a  medically comprehensive residential treatment centers  environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.

 Read Real Success Stories from our Families 

 Read More 

 Are you struggling to find the right help for your teen?

The professional clinicians at Elevations residential treatment centers have served as guardians of change for adolescents struggling to find hope and acceptance. Every day, our skilled and passionate professionals encourage students to build upon their strengths and abandon self-defeating behaviors. Because of this, our clinicians are among the most sought out group of professionals in the industry, garnishing referrals from both parents and professionals alike.

 When you send your child to Elevations RTC, one of the leading residential treatment centers,  you can be confident that they will receive the most advanced therapeutic intervention possible.   The problems they face in today’s world are very complicated and because of this, their struggle to regain a sure foundation requires a well tailored and proven approach.

 
 Student Profile 

 

Elevations RTC is a normalized high school in a nurturing  residential treatment centers  environment. We have teachers who directly teach concepts instead of students having to learn through packets or assignments. Elevations RTC also offers a all gender environment.

Elevations RTC teaches students practical study skills which will empower them to succeed in education long after leaving this setting. We teach critical thinking, organization, note-taking, setting goals and monitoring progress, recognizing priorities, maximizing use of time, discovering confidence, and envisioning success.

Our teaching  staff  will not only help your child learn, but will provide them with the tools to be successful in high school, college or beyond.

 
 Academics Programming 

Elevations Program Overview Video

Elevations RTC helps families from all over the country. Take a look at what parents and students have to say about our program.

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 Residential Treatment Centers Offer Hope to Families

What makes Elevations one of the premier residential treatment centers? With a focus aimed exclusively at adolescents ages 13 – 18, we are able to provide a unique combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care. We offer specialized clinical programming to address specific problems, accredited academics to ensure your teen can graduate on time, and experiential education opportunities to build confidence and resiliency.

All of this takes place in a medically comprehensive residential environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence and reconnect with their life.

​Elevations does not and shall not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion (creed), gender, gender expression, age, national origin (ancestry), disability, marital status, sexual orientation, or military status, in any of its activities or operations.

 
 Why Choose Elevations RTC 

 CONTACT US TODAY TO HELP YOUR CHILD 

REDISCOVER THE PERSON THEY ARE TO MEANT TO BECOME.

 Contact Us 

Diversity, Inclusion, and Belonging

Our statement on promoting acceptance

Elevations, Seven Stars, The Approach, and The ViewPoint Center are committed to reflect on ourselves and our systems to take action in ways that support equity and inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, and identity. We are committed to doing better; we are committed to providing better support for marginalized members of our community. Our goal is to make positive, everlasting change in the lives of our students and their families, as well as create a safe space on our campus for all students, staff, and families.  We will continue to listen, evolve, and improve our services.

- The Syracuse Campus Leadership Team

 The 5 Peaks of Elevations 

 

Peak 1: Relationship Model

 

Every aspect of Elevations is driven by a relationship model where we seek to repair family and peer relationships.

 
 
 

 

Peak 2 : Therapeutic

 

Elevations provides a highly professional, therapeutic program which is supported by our accredited staff.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 3 : Engaging

 

Elevations offers amazing opportunities for students to experience clinically supported adventure therapy.

 
 
 

 

PEAK 4 : Valuable

 

At Elevations, we know that there is no price that you can put on the success and happiness of your child.

 
 
 

 

Peak 5 : Future Oriented

 

At Elevations, we can help your teen find their success for college and beyond.

 
 
 

 
 
 

Need programming specifically developed for Neurodivergence and Autism?

 DISCOVER SEVEN STARS 

 
 
 

Need transition programming to practice autonomous living skills?

 THE APPROACH HOME 

 
 

 

 Row wavy Shape Decorative svg added to bottom

 Accreditations and Membership 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get in touch 

 info@elevationsrtc.com 

 +1 (855) 290-9681 

 

 

Elevations RTC provides a comprehensive, highly professional, therapeutic program, utilizing an interdisciplinary approach for adolescents of all genders ages 13-18. The Elevations program includes college preparatory academics, therapeutic recreation activities, and individual, family and group psychotherapy as well as on-site medical and psychiatric services available to all students. Elevations offers guidance, support, and relief to students facing difficulties stemming from trauma, depression, anxiety, mood disorders, behavioral problems, and/or substance use. Elevations RTC is located in Syracuse, UT just north of Salt Lake City.

 © 2026 Elevations RTC. All rights reserved.

What is Elevations RTC: One of the Leading Residential Treatment Centers
Elevations RTC is one of the leading Residential Treatment Centers offering guidance, support, and relief to students of all genders.
From depression to anxiety to defiance to bullying, Elevations RTC is one of the more respected residential treatment centers in America.
Elevations RTC is uniquely focused on providing an all-gender inclusive, real-world residential environment with a combination of intensive psychiatric treatment and personalized care.

All of this takes place in a medically comprehensive residential treatment centers environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence, happiness, and reconnect with their life.
The professional clinicians at Elevations residential treatment centers have served as guardians of change for adolescents struggling to find hope and acceptance.
When you send your child to Elevations RTC, one of the leading residential treatment centers, you can be confident that they will receive the most advanced therapeutic intervention possible.
Elevations RTC is a normalized high school in a nurturing residential treatment centers environment.
Residential Treatment Centers Offer Hope to Families
What makes Elevations one of the premier residential treatment centers?

All of this takes place in a medically comprehensive residential environment designed to help a struggling adolescent acquire the skills and proactive mindset they need to regain their self-confidence and reconnect with their life.

Elevations RTC, one of the top residential treatment centers , serves teens of all genders ages 13 -17 who are struggling with a wide range of issues, whether it be mental, behavioral or academic issues.
Residential treatment centers offer help for teens struggling with a wide range of emotional issues that are not limited solely to any one disorder.
Out of the many reasons to choose a residential treatment center for your child, perhaps the most important is the fact that residential treatment provides 24/7 professional support.
Choosing a residential treatment center for your child can make the difference in helping them return to a healthy path.
Residential Treatment Centers for Teens - Elevations RTC
Residential Treatment Centers for Teens
What are residential treatment centers for teens?
Residential treatment centers for teens are inpatient facilities made specifically for individuals grappling with behavioral and/or emotional issues.

Residential treatment centers for teens usually offer a wide variety of therapeutic treatment options, an accredited academic program, and are staffed by a team of expert therapists and passionate supervisors.
Teen residential treatment centers strive to equip struggling individuals with the knowledge and tools to work through their issues.
Residential treatment centers for teens often provide a number of therapies in order to give struggling adolescents the best treatment possible.
Some residential treatment centers for teens are geared towards helping a specific gender or set of behavioral or emotional issues.
Many residential treatment centers offer programming that work towards treating specific diagnoses.

Overall, residential treatment centers for teens want to help individuals work through and overcome their specific emotional or behavioral issues by developing coping skills that can be transferred back home and used over a lifetime.
Who do residential treatment centers for teens help?
Residential treatment centers for teens sometimes treat individuals based on diagnosis, gender, or age.
Some residential treatment centers focus on younger teens, some focus on older teens.
A large amount of residential treatment centers help teens struggling with behavioral and/or emotional issues such as:
Many residential treatment centers for teens provide programming designed specifically for diagnoses like ADHD, ODD, OCD, bipolar disorder, or school refusal.
Benefits of residential treatment centers for teens
Traditional therapy is not always a large enough intervention for struggling teens, which is why residential treatment centers exist.
Residential treatment centers for teens offer many benefits to individuals and families:
24/7 Care : Residential treatment centers for teens offer ‘round the clock care by trained staff.
Safe and Secure : The facilities created for residential treatment centers are designed to have the utmost safety so they have a secure environment for teens to make mistakes and grow.
Accredited Academic Programs : Many residential treatment centers provide academic programs so that students will not fall behind while receiving therapeutic treatment.
Individualized Plans : Oftentimes residential treatment centers for teens strive to have a program that can cater to the needs to each individual student.
Residential treatment centers often work on repairing the family dynamic by offering family therapy and weekly communication with the family.
Elevations RTC as a residential treatment center for teens
Elevations RTC is one of the leading all gender residential treatment centers for teens.
Unlike many residential treatment centers for teens , Elevations provides a real-world residential setting combined with psychiatric treatment and care.
Residential treatment in the media
Residential treatment centers are often used for helping with anything from major depression to eating disorder to substance use.
Which is why Ke$ha , well-known pop-singer, checked herself into a residential treatment facility to get help for her eating disorder.
” She said she entered residential treatment to help her “love herself” again.
Another pop idol that has experienced time in residential treatment is Demi Lovato.
Finally, after a violent episode, she got treatment in a residential treatment center for teens.
Residential treatment centers for teens defined by
Comprehensive Guide to Programs for Struggling Teens: Choosing the Best Residential Treatment for Teens
Residential treatment centers (RTCs): Licensed care facility which provides 24/7 intensive therapeutic care in a structured setting, including academic support.
Who Benefits from Teen Therapy and Residential Treatment Centers?
Why Choose Inpatient Care or Residential Treatment for Adolescents?

There are many options when it comes to therapeutic support for teens, but Elevations RTC stands out as one of the nation’s leading high-outcome residential treatment centers and mental health boarding schools for teens ages 13 to 17.
Staff at Elevations are dedicated to improving standards of care for youth in residential treatment centers across the nation.
Inpatient care can provide a deeper, more specialized approach with longer-term outcomes for acute cases.
In a recent People interview , singer and mental health advocate Demi Lovato opened up about attending five different inpatient mental health programs throughout her life.
Elevations, one of the best residential treatment centers for teens , is uniquely focused on providing a premier gender inclusive residential therapeutic experience for ages 13 – 18.
Residential Treatment Center for Troubled Teens
Unlike other residential treatment programs , large classrooms, library, climbing wall, full gym, art studio, athletic fields, dining room, and multiple residence halls, we have many amenities.
